descriptionText: Hanse 455 For Sale 2018 | Guest cabins:3This Hanse 455 For Sale 2018 represents a well‑maintained and thoughtfully equipped example of one of Hanse’s most respected performance‑cruising yachts. She is currently lying in Campania under the Italian flag and has had only two owners since new. Known for combining easy handling with comfortable cruising features, this 2018 model offers a balanced package that suits experienced sailors as well as those looking to step into a capable family cruiser.Specifications - Hanse 455 For Sale 2018:• Year: 2018 • Length overall: 14.04 m • Beam: 4.38 m • Draft: 1.82 m • Displacement: 11,700 kg • Cabins: 3 doubles + dinette berth • Bathrooms: 2 • Engine: Yanmar 80 hp, 2000 hours • Fuel capacity: 220 L • Fresh water capacity: 450 L • Hull material: fibreglass + carbon • Teak: deckhouse, side decks, cockpit • Sails: furling mainsail, self‑tacking jib, Code 0 • Winches: 4 (2 electric) • Electronics: B&G suite, 2 plotters, autopilot, VHF • Air conditioning: Velair 16,000 BTU • Bow thruster: retractable • Safety: life raft valid to 2026, new windlass 2025The boat presents in good condition, with hull, deck, and interior all showing careful ownership. The white fibreglass and carbon hull retains a clean finish, and the extensive teak—found on the deckhouse, side decks, and cockpit—has been kept in very good condition. Her layout is designed for both comfort and practicality, featuring three double cabins, two bathrooms, and a bright saloon with light mahogany interiors. Additional berths in the dinette offer flexibility for guests or family.On deck, the Hanse philosophy of simplified sailing is clear. The self‑tacking jib, furling mainsail, and electric winches help ensure manageable handling even with a small crew. The retractable bow thruster adds ease when manoeuvring in tight harbours. A beige sprayhood and bimini provide shelter in the cockpit, and a teak table completes the outdoor living space.Powered by an 80 hp Yanmar engine with 2000 hours (updated November 2025), the boat has been serviced annually, keeping her mechanical systems reliable. The folding propeller and saildrive transmission support smooth and efficient cruising. The electrical setup includes four new batteries (installed in 2024), a battery charger, and a 12/220V system. Comfort features such as heating and a Velair 16,000 BTU air‑conditioning system in the saloon and owner’s cabin extend usability throughout the year.Navigation and onboard electronics include B&G instruments, two plotters, autopilot, VHF, depth sounder, wind instrument, and a stereo. These systems support confident cruising whether on coastal routes or longer offshore passages, for which she holds CE Category A certification.With ample freshwater capacity of 450 litres, a boiler, external shower, and well‑organised galley equipped with stove, oven, and fridge, she is ready for extended stays on board. Safety equipment includes a life raft valid until 2026, fenders, mooring lines, and a new windlass (2025).Overall, this Hanse 455 For Sale 2018 is a practical and comfortable yacht that has been kept in good condition, making her a reliable option for anyone seeking a capable cruiser with thoughtful features and a straightforward sailing setup.
descriptionHtml:
Hanse 455 For Sale 2018 | Guest cabins:3

This Hanse 455 For Sale 2018 represents a well‑maintained and thoughtfully equipped example of one of Hanse’s most respected performance‑cruising yachts. She is currently lying in Campania under the Italian flag and has had only two owners since new. Known for combining easy handling with comfortable cruising features, this 2018 model offers a balanced package that suits experienced sailors as well as those looking to step into a capable family cruiser.

Specifications - Hanse 455 For Sale 2018:

• Year: 2018
• Length overall: 14.04 m
• Beam: 4.38 m
• Draft: 1.82 m
• Displacement: 11,700 kg
• Cabins: 3 doubles + dinette berth
• Bathrooms: 2
• Engine: Yanmar 80 hp, 2000 hours
• Fuel capacity: 220 L
• Fresh water capacity: 450 L
• Hull material: fibreglass + carbon
• Teak: deckhouse, side decks, cockpit
• Sails: furling mainsail, self‑tacking jib, Code 0
• Winches: 4 (2 electric)
• Electronics: B&G suite, 2 plotters, autopilot, VHF
• Air conditioning: Velair 16,000 BTU
• Bow thruster: retractable
• Safety: life raft valid to 2026, new windlass 2025

The boat presents in good condition, with hull, deck, and interior all showing careful ownership. The white fibreglass and carbon hull retains a clean finish, and the extensive teak—found on the deckhouse, side decks, and cockpit—has been kept in very good condition. Her layout is designed for both comfort and practicality, featuring three double cabins, two bathrooms, and a bright saloon with light mahogany interiors. Additional berths in the dinette offer flexibility for guests or family.

On deck, the Hanse philosophy of simplified sailing is clear. The self‑tacking jib, furling mainsail, and electric winches help ensure manageable handling even with a small crew. The retractable bow thruster adds ease when manoeuvring in tight harbours. A beige sprayhood and bimini provide shelter in the cockpit, and a teak table completes the outdoor living space.

Powered by an 80 hp Yanmar engine with 2000 hours (updated November 2025), the boat has been serviced annually, keeping her mechanical systems reliable. The folding propeller and saildrive transmission support smooth and efficient cruising. The electrical setup includes four new batteries (installed in 2024), a battery charger, and a 12/220V system. Comfort features such as heating and a Velair 16,000 BTU air‑conditioning system in the saloon and owner’s cabin extend usability throughout the year.

Navigation and onboard electronics include B&G instruments, two plotters, autopilot, VHF, depth sounder, wind instrument, and a stereo. These systems support confident cruising whether on coastal routes or longer offshore passages, for which she holds CE Category A certification.

With ample freshwater capacity of 450 litres, a boiler, external shower, and well‑organised galley equipped with stove, oven, and fridge, she is ready for extended stays on board. Safety equipment includes a life raft valid until 2026, fenders, mooring lines, and a new windlass (2025).

Overall, this Hanse 455 For Sale 2018 is a practical and comfortable yacht that has been kept in good condition, making her a reliable option for anyone seeking a capable cruiser with thoughtful features and a straightforward sailing setup.
